title: Paper Minecraft (2D Clone)
description: A legendary 2D fan-made clone of Minecraft by Griffpatch. Play craft, build, and survive in singleplayer or custom maps.

title: React Tetris
description: Compete with yourself in this ultra-smooth, retro-inspired brick-sorting classic. Features clean mechanics and high-speed drops.

title: Sandspiel Physics Toy
description: An interactive sand physics sandbox. Mix elements like fire, water, wind, plants, and acid to watch natural reactions and crazy explosions.

title: Hextris Deluxe
description: Rotate the central hexagon to stack colored blocks. Clear lines by matching 3 or more blocks of the same color.

title: Flappy Bird HTML5
description: The addictive classic flappy survival game. Tap or press Space/Left Click to flap your wings and navigate between pipes.

title: Retro Pacman Clone
description: Dodge the ghosts, eat the dots, and rack up highscores in this faithful adaptation of the classic arcade maze game.

title: Vector Asteroids
description: Fly a triangular spaceship through an asteroid field. Shoot down space rocks and avoid collision in vector graphics space.

title: Classic Space Invaders
description: Defend the planet from rows of encroaching alien spaceships. Hide behind shields and launch firing volleys.
